top_signals.title: Who Runs the Ransomware Group ‘The Gentlemen?’
top_signals.summary: A cybercrime group known as The Gentlemen has emerged as the second most active ransomware gang by victim count, rapidly attracting a talented pool of hackers through an aggressive recruitment strategy that promises affiliates 90 percent of any ransom paid by victims. This post examines clues pointing to a real life identity for the administrator of The Gentlemen ransomware group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
top_signals.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cyberattack on Russian tech firm Astral disrupts business, government services for week
top_signals.summary: According to customer complaints, the disruption affected a range of services used by businesses, leading to interruptions in cash register operations, difficulties selling certain regulated goods, loss of access to customer portals and corporate email and problems with electronic human resources document management systems and authentication using digital certificates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gavin Newsom says Trump ordered DOJ to investigate him and his wife
top_signals.summary: California Gov. Newsom called President Donald Trump "simply the most corrupt President in American history."

top_signals.title: Critical Fortinet FortiSandbox flaws now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers are now exploiting several critical vulnerabilities in Fortinet's FortiSandbox cyber threat detection platform, according to threat intelligence company Defused. [...]
